name: Stir-Fried Chicken & Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into cubes and place in a bowl. Combine honey and curry powder, then mix through the chicken.
2. Stir in apple slices.
3. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over high heat. Saute celery for 1 minute.
4. Add the apple mixture and stir fry for 3-4 minutes, just until the chicken is no longer pink.
5. Add raisins and chopped parsley, stirring well. Serve over rice.
